headlines.description: — Jalen Hurts had trouble feeling his hands. With bone-chilling wind whipping through Soldier Field, he even found it difficult to see. Some big hits only added to his pain.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurts runs for 3 TDs as Eagles squeeze by Bears 25-20

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Saints tight end Juwan Johnson talked about getting “freaky” after making a catch near the goal line. Speedy rookie receiver Rashid Shaheed recalled his heart “racing fast” when he knew part-time quarterback Taysom Hill was about to throw deep.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dalton, Hill TD passes lift Saints over Falcons 21-18

events.name: Detroit Lions at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions were stymied for most of the game, unable to get much going against the New York Jets.
headlines.shortLinkText: Goff stuns Jets late as Lions hold on for 20-17 victory

headlines.description: — Mitch Trubisky knew his grasp on the Steelers' starting quarterback job was tenuous at best when he took the field on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Trubisky solid, Steelers' D shuts down Panthers in 24-16 win

headlines.description: — Rayshawn Jenkins snatched the ball inches from the ground and raced the other way.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaguars intercept Prescott, stun Cowboys 40-34 in OT

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Houston Texans

headlines.description: — Wearing shirts that read “Conquered the West” and baseball caps commemorating their AFC West title, the Kansas City Chiefs celebrated winning the division for a seventh straight season after outlasting the Houston Texans in overtime Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: McKinnon's 26-yard run in OT lifts Chiefs over Texans 30-24

headlines.description: — Backup quarterback Brett Rypien led the Denver Broncos to their first win since October.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rypien overcomes pressure, rallies Broncos past Cards 24-15

events.name: New England Patriots at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — The New England Patriots decided playing for overtime wasn't enough. They avoided OT, but not in the way they intended.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones snags lateral on final play, Raiders stun Patriots

events.name: Tennessee Titans at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert had one simple message for his Los Angeles Chargers teammates with the game tied late in the fourth quarter against the Tennessee Titans on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dicker's FG propels Chargers to 17-14 victory over Titans

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals never blinked.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow throws for 4 TDs, Bengals rally past Buccaneers 34-23

events.name: New York Giants at Washington Commanders

headlines.description: — Prime time finally likes the New York Giants, and now they're a huge step closer to making the playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants beat Commanders in prime time to end winless streak
